title: Oracle + NVIDIA at GTC 2026: GPU-Accelerated Vector Search in Oracle AI Database 26ai
summary: At NVIDIA GTC 2026 (March 18), Oracle unveiled GPU-accelerated vector index generation in Oracle AI Database 26ai using NVIDIA cuVS. Also showcased: NeMo Agent Toolkit integration with Oracle DB for enterprise AI agents that optimize quality, latency, and cost.

title: Oracle Private Agent Factory: No-Code AI Agent Platform for 26ai
summary: Oracle announced Private Agent Factory — a no-code AI agent builder for Oracle AI Database 26ai. Business analysts can build and securely deploy data-driven agents without third-party services. Runs as a container in any cloud or on-premises environment.

title: Oracle Launches 22 Fusion Agentic Applications at AI World London
summary: At Oracle AI World in London on March 24, 2026, Oracle announced 22 new Fusion Agentic Applications — enterprise apps powered by AI agents for finance, HR, and supply chain. Also introduced: Agentic Applications Builder for creating AI agents without coding.

title: Ukraine Bans 1C: 27 Products Added to Prohibited Software List
summary: Ukraine's State Special Communications Service published an updated list of prohibited software, including 27 products from 1C and BAS. The ban applies to government agencies, institutions, and critical infrastructure facilities.
